products.description: Parent s Choice 9 fl oz Bottle 0+ Months Slow Flow is designed to feed your little one in a way that mimics breastfeeding. These special silicone nipples are breast-like in shape and are easy to latch onto. They re also soft like skin promoting a natural feeding experience for your precious bundle of joy. Simply fill the bottle with 9 fluid ounces of water formula breastmilk or your baby s favorite juice. The vented slow flow nipple is sturdy enough to prevent collapsing during feeding and helps to prevent ingestion of air by baby. Ingesting air or liquid too fast can cause your little one to become gassy have an upset stomach and become fussy. For your convenience all components of this bottle are dishwasher and microwave safe. Feeding time is a special bond with your child. Let Parent s Choice 9 fl oz Bottle 0+ Months Slow Flow help you create those special moments.

products.title: The Bakery Old Fashioned Soft Sugar Cookies, 11.5 Oz, 10 Count
products.category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Bakery > Cookies
products.description: The Bakery Old Fashioned Soft Sugar Cookies are moist and delicious with a soft chewy texture, and glistening, crackly tops created with a sprinkling of sugar. These old fashioned sugar cookies are chewy and soft, with a hint of crispy caramelization around the edges. They are great to taste on their own and can be served with your favorite spread, ice cream and coffee for a more enjoyable snack time. Made with high quality wheat flour and other high quality ingredients, these cookies make a delicious treat any time of the day. These cookies come in conveniently sized box that is ideal for office break rooms, road trips, school lunch rooms or family outings. The sweetness of sugar cookies and the colorful sugar topping make them a popular snack especially with children. The Bakery Old Fashioned Soft Sugar Cookies give the traditional sugar cookies that we all love, a traditional old world charm and make them the perfect anytime anywhere sweet treat.

products.category: Cameras & Optics > Photography > Lighting & Studio > Light Meters
products.description: Get an accurate read on oxygen levels and pulse rates with the ReliOn Pulse Oximeter. This medical accessory features an HD display with a multi-directional screen that allows for comfortable viewing from two sides. The ReliOn oximeter is suitable for monitoring patients at home, as it enables timely intervention in case of failing health. You can also utilize the unit to monitor your heart rate and breathing while exercising. The finger pulse oximeter is ideal for sports and aviation use. This medical accessory has adjustable levels of brightness and one-button operation for ease of use. It comes with a carrying case, lanyard and two AAA batteries.ReliOn understands all the ways diabetes touches your life. With affordable, reliable products and total lifestyle support, ReliOn helps you be your best you.
